analyze-top-classes.ps1: Analyze and report on the largest or most complex classes in the codebase.
build-distribution.bat: Build the game for distribution (release output).
build-fix.bat: Thorough build fix: clean and rebuild to resolve build cache issues.
clean-all.bat: Most thorough clean: remove bin/obj, dotnet clean, clear NuGet cache, then rebuild. Use when nothing else works.
code-quality-metrics.ps1: Run code quality metrics and report results.
count-cs-lines-no-tests.ps1: Count lines of C# code excluding test files.
count-cs-lines.ps1: Count total lines of C# code.
count-gamedata-lines.ps1: Count lines in game data files.
fix-build-cache.bat: Fix build cache (batch): clear NuGet cache and rebuild.
fix-build-cache.ps1: Fix build cache (PowerShell): clear NuGet cache and rebuild. Use when quick clean didn't work.
fix-build.bat: Thorough build fix: clears NuGet cache and rebuilds.
generate-data.bat: Generate or update game data from sources.
multi-language-count.ps1: Count lines across multiple languages in the project.
push-actions-to-sheets.ps1: Push GameData/Actions.json to Google Sheets (OAuth 2.0 + SheetsPushConfig.json).
push-actions.bat: Push Actions.json to Google Sheets via OAuth (batch wrapper).
parse-from-google-sheets.ps1: Parse action data from Google Sheets.
quick-clean.bat: Quick clean: remove bin/obj and rebuild. Fastest option when build errors appear but code looks correct.
quick-clean.ps1: Quick clean (PowerShell): remove bin/obj and rebuild. Fastest option for build cache issues.
run-parser.ps1: Run the spreadsheet or data parser.
show-metrics.bat: Load and display build and code metrics (batch).
show-metrics.ps1: Load and display build and code metrics.
system-breakdown.ps1: Generate a breakdown of the system or codebase structure.
